locations.name: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约
locations.summary: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约（法語：Louis Pierre Vieillot，1748年5月10日—1830年8月24日）是法国的鳥類學家。 维埃约是第一批用卡尔·林奈式二名法科学描述鸟类的研究者之一。至少有26个他命名的鸟类至今仍在学术界使用…

locations.name: 萨尔塔省
locations.summary: 萨尔塔省（西班牙語：Provincia de Salta）為南美國家阿根廷二十三省之一，位於阿根廷西北部，省会萨尔塔。 萨尔塔省风光

locations.name: 丘布特省
locations.summary: 丘布特省（Chubut）為南美國家阿根廷二十三省之一，位於阿根廷南部，首府為罗森。

relations.subject: White-tipped plantcutter
relations.evidence: The white-tipped plantcutter (Phytotoma rutila) is a species of bird in the family Cotingidae, the cotingas. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Paraguay, Uruguay, and as a vagrant to Brazil and Chile.Remsen, J

relations.subject: White-tipped plantcutter
relations.evidence: It is found in central and southern Bolivia and into northern Argentina's Salta Province

relations.subject: White-tipped plantcutter
relations.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found from Paraguay south into western Uruguay and northern and eastern Argentina as far as northeastern Chubut Province. The species has also occurred as a vagrant in Brazil and Chile. The species inhabits a variety of landscapes, most of which are fairly open
